name: copilot-money-mcp
description: MCP server for Copilot Money - query and manage personal finances with AI using local data (35 tools)
author: Ignacio Hermosilla <hello@ignaciohermosilla.com>

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external classic-level && bun build src/core/decode-worker.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external classic-level && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/server.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external classic-level && bun build src/core/decode-worker.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external classic-level
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/tools/ tests/core/ tests/models/ tests/utils/
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun test --bail
scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format
scripts.pack:mcpb: bun run build:bundle && bun run build && bunx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun test
